title: Production Readiness
decision_rule: Agent chat can ship only when every required gate is passing in the target environment or has a documented launch exception.

required_validation.name: Agent policy and schema unit coverage
GUI and chat action convergence coverage

release_gates.acceptance: Core workflows remain usable without a local LLM.
release_checks: Chat opens without model initialization as a hard dependency.
Deterministic planning handles public service questions, route navigation, and confirmation replies.
Local LLM output remains advisory and is validated before execution.

release_gates.acceptance: Public 211 answers are grounded in browser GraphRAG evidence and cite service records.
release_checks: Public service facts include citations or explicit missing-fact guidance.
Answers use the existing static corpus path rather than a second retrieval stack.
No private wallet context is required for public 211 retrieval.

release_gates.acceptance: Chat can navigate supported Abby routes through typed app actions.
release_checks: Navigation uses registered route IDs.
Navigation does not require confirmation because it is read-public app control.
GUI and chat route changes share the app state route model.

release_gates.acceptance: Wallet writes, disclosures, proofs, exports, analytics consent, and destructive tools are confirmation gated.
release_checks: write_wallet and share_or_disclose tools stage a confirmation request before execution.
Denied, expired, or canceled confirmations do not execute partial writes.
Confirmed execution still goes through the surface API, wallet authorization, and audit requirements.

release_gates.acceptance: Private wallet context is redacted by default and tested before release.
release_checks: Private notes, precise location, document text, provider conversations, and raw query history are excluded unless explicitly allowed.
Private-context opt-in is scoped to the current task.
Raw chat transcripts are not persisted by default.

release_gates.acceptance: Operators have documented validation, troubleshooting, rollback, and privacy incident procedures.
release_checks: Runbook lists standard validation and release gates.
Threat model documents model boundaries, trust boundaries, confirmation policy, and private-context handling.
Rollback and privacy incident procedures are linked to wallet operations guidance.

release_gates.acceptance: Chat drawer, bottom sheet, confirmation cards, and consent cards have accessibility and mobile review coverage.
release_checks: No P0/P1 accessibility blockers are accepted without a launch exception.
Keyboard, focus, screen-reader, reduced-motion, and mobile viewport behavior are reviewed.
Known follow-ups remain tracked outside the release blocker list.

operator_handoff.rollback_strategy: Disable affected tools in surfaceRegistry.ts, fall back to deterministic read-only chat, and re-run validation before re-enabling.
